scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @maintainpro/api" "npm run dev --workspace @maintainpro/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @maintainpro/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @maintainpro/api && npm run build --workspace @maintainpro/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @maintainpro/api && npm run lint --workspace @maintainpro/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @maintainpro/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @maintainpro/web
